body_excerpt: {"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-9086", "cvss": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-79"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Description\r\nA flaw was found in Keycloak. A remote attacker with administrative privileges, specifically those with `manage-client` permission or access to client registration endpoints, could bypass client Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) validation. This is achieved by registering a malicious client with a specially crafted redirect URI using a case-insensitive `javascript:` or `data:` scheme. This Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability allows for arbitrary code execution in the Keycloak origin when a victim clicks the crafted link, such as in the logout flow or the Admin Console.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v3f7-2p4r-mwfw", "html_url": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/security/advisories/GHSA-v3f7-2p4r-mwfw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v3f7-2p4r-mwfw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-9086"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-06-26T22:51:39Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/546680?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/pskopek", "id": 546680, "login": "pskopek", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjU0NjY4MA==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/pskopek", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Cross-site scripting (xss) via case-insensitive uri validation bypass", "updated_at": "2026-06-26T22:51:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/keycloak/keycloak/security-advisories/GHSA-v3f7-2p4r-mwfw", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "", "name": ""}, "patched_versions": "26.6.4", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
